textByHash.fe3bf0711ae63a28737d9ce5f04ff31aea63316f: The eggs are safe once more! Good work, human.
textByHash.9e5648ed4983b904ad55b19fe3b403a6925bf360: It's very rare for a human to set foot on the Little Pearl.
textByHash.a882b529344633acf779be9c45e22c3eae6d60e8: As are we. You've made a very good impression on us all.
